stemHtml: When should a pilot include the word heavy in his/her ATC transmission?

options.a: Initial call when the aircraft mass is higher than 136 000 kg.
options.b: Every call when mass is higher than 136 000 kg.
options.c: Initial call when the aircraft mass is higher than 113 000 kg.
options.d: Every call when mass is higher than 113 000 kg.
